programmes.show_description: All-Stars: Africa Strikes Twice. One survivalist takes a huge risk to secure a big kill for his team. Plus, torrential rain and plummeting temperatures forces someone to leave. S3, Ep3
All-Stars: To Hail And Back. Freezing rainstorms torture the remaining survivalists, risking severe hypothermia. Plus, a successful hunt ends up backfiring. S3, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Lexington Storefront. The team are in Lexington, VA, where a refurbished storefront is being renovated rather than destroyed. They turn the windowpanes into a room divider. S10, Ep3
Alexandria Church. The guys visit Alexandria, VA, to salvage a church and save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. And they must get creative! S10, Ep4
Brawl Of Duty - Part 1. As tempers flare, the conflict between Shawn and the Kellys becomes physical. Meanwhile, mechanical difficulties plague the Mistress. S11, Ep9
Brawl Of Duty - Part 2. As tempers flare, the conflict between Shawn and the Kellys becomes physical. Meanwhile, mechanical difficulties plague the Mistress. S11, Ep10
Chris And Vince. Paul Mackie and the team try to find the causes of a two-year dry streak that threatens to end the dreams of rookie prospectors Chris Moore and Vince Federici. S1, Ep3
The Emergency Surgery. Today, Julia is assisted by her husband, John. Together, they catch the second most venomous snake in the world in a cramped laundry room. S1, Ep6
Shipwrecked. The 2009 crab season is almost over, and a savage storm causes multiple maydays. Can the Coast Guard save four men before their boat is pounded against the rocks? S5, Ep16
Slow Burn. The crab season starts with tensions high. Blood isn't thicker than salt water on the Cornelia Marie, there's deckhand poaching afoot and the fleet loses a vessel. S6, Ep1
A Steep Price. A discovery on the island fires up the team. But as excitement builds, some dangerous encounters threaten to end the mission - and people's lives. S1, Ep3
City Of Gold. Josh treks the Inca Trail through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of a mythical city of gold. His journey takes a detour to the ruins of Machu Picchu. S1, Ep5
Captain Morgan's Lost Gold. Josh dives into the Lajas Reef in search of the treasure of legendary pirate Henry Morgan. His journey takes him to a modern marvel, the Panama Canal. S1, Ep6
Ozark Mountain Misery. The Raneys head off to answer an SOS call from an off-grid couple. But with severe storms threatening floods, they are in a race against Mother Nature. S1, Ep15
Methane Meltdown. The Raneys try to restore a failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the property. S1, Ep16
Last Chance. The end of the mining season is near. The Rookies gamble their hopes on one last haul of opal and the Opal Queen makes a final desperate dig. S2, Ep13
The Young Guns face an uncertain future when James gets injured. The Bushmen find opal on the boundary of their mine, and rain slows down the Cheals. S5, Ep1
First Timers. Captain Sean Dwyer and his crew prepare for their first crab season aboard the Brenna A. Jake fears he made a big mistake, and Wild Bill faces a challenging deckhand. S12, Ep2
No Good Deed. Wild Bill risks his biggest lead to bail Josh out of trouble and Sean finds out if he's got what it takes. Plus, can veteran skipper Johnathan turn his season around? S12, Ep3
Back For Seconds. A surprise twist sends the crew into overdrive while they're already battling freezing temperatures to deliver this dream home. S15, Ep3
Appalachian Ancestry. The team travels to Berea, Kentucky to save a masterpiece of Appalachian craftsmanship - an incredible log cabin built in 1795. S15, Ep3
The Poseidon Crew clash over a decision to switch claims. Shane and Russell receive help from a gyrocopter, and the Ferals are hit by exhaustion. S6, Ep18
All-Stars: Dead Weight. One camp enters the lion's den to hunt for big game. The other team bands together for a group hunt and ends up finding a dangerous, unexpected food source. S3, Ep5
All-Stars: Burn Notice. A devastating injury and a vicious storm that destroys the survivalists' food supply threatens to tear apart the newly-merged camp. S3, Ep6

Teleshopping.
Barnesville House. The guys tackle Ohio's snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house. Back in the shop, Tay devises a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table. S10, Ep5
Return To Barnesville. The team take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio. A return client has an idea for a dining table set made from rusted baskets. S10, Ep6
Truce Or Consequences - Part 1. Shawn and Kris attempt to settle their feud for good. In the hopes of jump-starting his season, Zeke embarks on a marathon suction dredging campaign. S11, Ep11
Truce Or Consequences - Part 2. Shawn and Kris attempt to settle their feud for good. In the hopes of jump-starting his season, Zeke embarks on a marathon suction dredging campaign. S11, Ep12
The Veterans. Paul Mackie's team have just six days to help a team of ex-servicemen become skilled mobile goldminers and reach their dream of funding a veteran's charity. S1, Ep4
Wild Dingo Territory. Julia's first customer discovers an eastern brown snake while gardening. Plus, Julia and John race to remove a python from a retirement home. S1, Ep7
Breaking 'em In. On the Kodiak and the Wizard the greenhorns are finding out how hard crabbing really is. And on Northwestern, skipper Sig is battling his brother as well as the seas. S6, Ep2
Sea Tested. It's the third week of hunting King crab and Skipper Phil and Skipper Sig's experiment in trading their junior deckhands is coming to a close. S6, Ep3
Dire Consequences. As injuries pile up, the team push deeper into the Island in search of the Treasure of the Trinity, but a trail of clues leads to confrontation. S1, Ep4
Code To Gold. Josh scours the Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale treasure. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, can he solve the mysterious puzzle? S1, Ep7
Viking Sunstone. Josh Gates travels to the UK and Norway to unlock the secrets of a mystical crystal used by the Vikings. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church. S1, Ep8
Storm Shelter Showdown - Part 1. The Raneys arrive in Missouri to see a family that has just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin, they also have no clean water source. S1, Ep17
Storm Shelter Showdown - Part 2. The Raneys arrive in Missouri to see a family that has just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin, they also have no clean water source. S1, Ep19
The Blacklighters spot one of the deadliest snakes in the world. The Young Guns take on a dangerous new mine, and the Opal Whisperers hunt for cathedral pattern opal. S5, Ep2
Rory and Oscar are forced to operate their dad's drill rig for the first time. The Tarantos are struck down by sickness, and the Bushmen build a dangerous mine roof. S5, Ep3
Swedish Twins. Josh is forced to take over the Cornelia Marie, whilst Sean gets his first taste of the angry sea. Meanwhile, greenhorns on the Cape Caution are slapped to attention. S12, Ep4
Million-Dollar-Bet. Jake tries a risky short cut with only one engine, and Casey and Josh perform surgery at sea. Can Edgar make his mark as captain with his novice son Eric on deck? S12, Ep5
An American Werewolf. The team respond to reports of a half-man, half-beast in Wisconsin. Attacks and sightings of the Beast of Bray Road have left locals scared for three decades. S2, Ep9
Bigfoot's Doorstep. A catastrophic storm threatens the expedition. Armed with AI technology, the team are ready to meet the elusive cryptid before it's too late. S5, Ep8
In the final week of their season, the Gold Timers are hit by a big storm. The Ferals have a medical emergency, and Linden breaks his gold drought. S6, Ep19
